name: Low-Fat Chocolate Cookies 2
recipeIngredient: 5 tbsp regular stick margarine at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first 7 ingredients together and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat the margarine, brown sugar, yogurt, egg whites, and vanilla with an electric mixer until blended. The mixture will look curdled.
3. Gradually beat in the flour mixture until blended.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours or until firm enough to handle.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
6. Pour the granulated sugar into a small bowl.
7. Roll tablespoonfuls of dough into 1-inch balls. Roll each ball in granulated sugar to coat.
8. Place the coated balls about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes until firm.
10. Cool on wire racks.
11. Store in an airtight container for up to 3 weeks.
Makes 48 cookies. Each cookie contains less than 1 gram of fat.
